message:
refactor: Extract agent commands to dedicated module

Continues the commands module modularization by moving agent management
commands to a dedicated agents.rs file:

**Extracted to agents.rs:**
- agents_list(): List detected AI coding agents and hook status
- agents_status(): Show detailed status for a specific agent
- agents_install_hook(): Install RCH hook into an agent's config
- agents_uninstall_hook(): Remove RCH hook from an agent's config

**Changes to mod.rs:**
- Adds `mod agents;` declaration
- Re-exports via `pub use agents::*` for backward compatibility
- Removes ~350 lines of agent-related code
- Simplifies imports (removes unused ConfigValueSource)

**Changes to config.rs:**
- Makes collect_value_sources() pub(super) for use by sibling modules
- Formatting cleanup in collect_worker_values() signature

This extraction follows the same pattern as the earlier config.rs and
workers.rs extractions, bringing the main mod.rs closer to being purely
a routing/dispatch layer.

Part of the ongoing bd-3ewx refactoring effort.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
